import{useEffect,useRef}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function PrintReceipt(_ref){let{order,onClose}=_ref;const printRef=useRef(null);if(!order)return null;const status=order.status||'결제완료';// A4 프린터 출력 const handlePrint=()=>{const printContent=printRef.current.innerHTML;const printWindow=window.open('','_blank');printWindow.document.write(` 영수증 - ${order.id}
